purpose: Prove IAMScope emits a validated Lambda PassRole escalation finding for one controlled IAM-only positive path.
claim_surface: IAMScope can collect the exact Lambda CreateFunction permission edge for Env18 Alice.
IAMScope can collect the exact iam:PassRole permission edge from Env18 Alice to the Lambda execution role.
IAMScope can collect Lambda service trust on the target execution role.
IAMScope can emit validated critical passrole_lambda for this target path without blockers.
benchmark_proves: For the Env18 alice->lambda-admin path, scenario.json contains the expected lambda:CreateFunction permission edge.
For the Env18 alice->lambda-admin path, scenario.json contains the expected iam:PassRole permission edge.
For the Env18 lambda service->lambda-admin path, scenario.json contains the expected sts:AssumeRole trust edge.
For that path, IAMScope emitted at least one validated passrole_lambda finding.
For that path, IAMScope emitted zero blocked passrole_lambda findings.
For that path, IAMScope emitted zero inconclusive passrole_lambda findings.
For that path, IAMScope emitted zero precondition_only passrole_lambda findings.
For that path, the core Lambda PassRole checks passed.
benchmark_does_not_prove: It does not prove ECS PassRole behavior.
It does not prove wildcard PassRole expansion correctness.
It does not prove Lambda runtime exploitability.
It does not prove cross-account PassRole behavior.
It does not prove production readiness.
unknowns_remaining: How every iam:PassedToService condition shape behaves remains outside this case.
How SCP, permission-boundary, and identity-Deny blockers interact with Lambda PassRole remains outside this case.
Whether broader PassRole families validate the same way remains unknown here.

environment.notes: Single-account IAM-only Lambda PassRole positive path. No Lambda function is created.

ground_truth.reason: Alice can create a precise Lambda function, pass env18-lambda-admin-exec, the role trusts Lambda, and the role has AdministratorAccess.

directly_proven_if_pass: The exact Env18 Lambda CreateFunction permission edge exists structurally.
The exact Env18 iam:PassRole permission edge exists structurally.
The exact Env18 Lambda service trust edge exists structurally.
The exact Env18 alice->lambda-admin path is emitted as validated passrole_lambda.
The exact Env18 alice->lambda-admin path is not emitted as blocked, inconclusive, or precondition_only.
strongly_supported_if_pass: IAMScope's Lambda PassRole reasoner behaves coherently on one controlled live AWS positive path.
only_implied_even_if_pass: Broader PassRole correctness remains only implied.
